known_patches.title: 0.5.1 Patch Notes — Return of the Ancients
known_patches.summary: 40 new Elemental Passive Skills, 24 new Atlas Passive Skills, new Lineage Support Gem (Atziri's Communion), huge caster buffs, passive tree changes, bug fixes

known_patches.title: Return of the Ancients — Runes of Aldur League
known_patches.summary: Major expansion: Martial Artist ascendancy, Atlas rework, Runes of Aldur league mechanic
